publishedAbstract: - When running pods with user namespaces enabled, mounting a CephFS-backed PVC fails. The pod does not start or starts without the volume mounted.- The following error is observed in pod events: ~~~ Error: container create failed: runc create failed: unable to start container process: error during container init: failed to fulfil mount request: failed to set MOUNT_ATTR_IDMAP on /var/.../mount: invalid argument (maybe the filesystem used doesn't support idmap mounts on this kernel?) ~~~ Key observations:- RBD volumes (ext4) mount successfully in user namespace pods- CephFS volumes fail consistently- Without user namespaces, both RBD and CephFS volumes mount successfully
publishedTitle: User namespaces pods fail to mount CephFS volumes with MOUNT_ATTR_IDMAP error in OCP 4.20
